title: Disconnect before write is not sent and safely classified

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
A fresh observation is reserved and the adapter can disconnect immediately before the first downstream write.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_display_capture only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked read call loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the display-capture disconnect injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_display_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked read call loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the display-status disconnect injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_input_keyboard only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the keyboard disconnect injector and release its reservations.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_input_mouse only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the mouse disconnect injector and release its reservations.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the paste disconnect injector and release its reservations.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_input_release only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the input-release disconnect injector and release its reservation.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_power_control only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation loses its route before any accepted ATX write.

fault_script.action: Clear the power disconnect injector and release its reservation.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_session_connect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked connect loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the session-connect disconnect injector and release its reservation.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_session_reconnect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked reconnect loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the session-reconnect disconnect injector and release its reservation.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot pre-write disconnect for jetkvm_session_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked read call loses its route before any accepted downstream write.

fault_script.action: Clear the session-status disconnect injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: The story leaves no disconnect injector armed.

steps.expect: CONNECTION_LOST read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes and no image block.
The one-shot fault is cleared and a new current owned session is proven before the next cell, with no replay.

CONNECTION_LOST read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes.
The fault is cleared, a new current owned session is proven, and a fresh keyboard observation is captured before the next cell, with no replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes and the observation reservation is released.
The fault is cleared, a new current owned session is proven, and a fresh mouse observation is captured before the next cell, with no replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes and the observation reservation is released.
The fault is cleared, a new current owned session is proven, and a fresh paste observation is captured before the next cell, with no replay.

Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes and the observation reservation is released.
The fault is cleared and a new current owned session is proven before the next cell, with no replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes.
The fault is cleared and a new current owned session with the recorded ATX baseline is proven before the next cell, with no replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes and zero ATX writes.
The fault is cleared, the prior session is closed, and an unowned connect baseline is proven before the next cell, with no ATX change or replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase connect, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step none, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes and releases the connect request reservation.
The fault is cleared and a new current owned session is proven before the reconnect cell, with no replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome not_sent, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes and releases the reconnect request reservation.
The fault is cleared and a new current owned session is proven before the final read cell, with no replay.

CONNECTION_LOST read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage write. Separately, adapter evidence records exactly zero accepted downstream writes.

pass.assertion: Every explicit mutation call returns canonical CONNECTION_LOST/not_sent with zero accepted downstream writes; session connect requires next step none and every other mutation requires reconnect_then_capture.

The explicit display capture, display status, and session status read calls return CONNECTION_LOST at phase execute with outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and downstream_stage write.

Each tool-specific one-shot fault is cleared before an executable recovery establishes the next current session and any required fresh observation; separate adapter telemetry proves zero accepted downstream writes.

evidence.source: The schema-validated mutation and read ToolError envelopes from each explicit ordered fake or replay call.
Ordered adapter telemetry separately proving accepted downstream write count 0 plus clear-and-recovery completion for every faulted call.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
